channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Vikings Wide Receiver Justin Jefferson hosts Youth Football Camp
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI/KSWB) - The NFL offseason is a time for players to train and gear up for the upcoming year, and for the best wide receiver in the league, that training program this offseason consists of being chased around by 300+ kids in San Diego for a day.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Bears announce five free agency signings
item.description: The Chicago Bears announced five free agency signings, including restricted free-agent defensive tackle Chris Williams and exclusive rights free agents defensive linemen Jonathan Ford and Daniel Hardy, offensive lineman Bill Murray and defensive back Ameer Speed.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Trump threatens more tariffs on China as global markets shudder over how much pain economy can take
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Undeterred by a panicked stock market, President Donald Trump threatened additional tariffs on China on Monday, raising fresh concerns that his drive to rebalance the global economy could intensify a financially destructive trade war.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Red Sox's Jarren Duran opens up about mental health, attempted suicide in Netflix documentary
item.description: Red Sox outfielder Jarren Duran said in an upcoming documentary series that two years before his 2024 All-Star season, the pressures of the sport led him to intense bouts of depression and an attempted suicide.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Hightower, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Maine sues Trump admin over funding freeze for refusal to keep trans athletes out of women's sports
item.description: Maine filed a lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Agriculture over a funding freeze the agency levied on the state for its refusal to alter its participation policy in sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vote now: Bay Area News Group girls athlete of the week
item.description: Top Bay Area athletes are featured in the Bay Area News Group's girls athlete of the week poll. Vote now and see who made the cut to be nominated this week. Athletes come from across the Mercury News and East Bay Times coverage area.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump gushes over Shohei Ohtani as president welcomes Dodgers to White House
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers star Shohei Ohtani was the talk of the East Room of the White House as President Donald Trump touted the star player's accomplishments.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohtani, Betts and World Series champion Dodgers visit Trump at the White House
item.description: President Donald Trump welcomed Shohei Ohtani, Mookie Betts and the reigning champion Los Angeles Dodgers to the White House on Monday to congratulate them for winning the World Series last season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: March Madness wraps in Florida-Houston matchup pitting tourney's best defense vs best clutch player
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — The national title game between Florida and Houston could come down to the NCAA Tournament's best clutch player against the country's best clutch defense. Walter Clayton Jr.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: One combined Final Four? Talks of a joint NCAA Tournament showcase for the men and women resurface
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Millions tuned in to watch women's basketball powerhouses UConn and South Carolina dominate in the Final Four on Friday. Many more watched Houston and Florida stun their opponents in the men's Final Four a day later.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jaquan Brisker's bond with Bears' DC Dennis Allen predates his NFL career
item.description: Jaquan Brisker was originally drafted by the Saints, but instead joined the Bears, where he will be reunited with his former defensive coordinator, Dennis Allen, who is now the Bears' defensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: UConn finishes season at No. 1 in AP women's basketball poll for first time since 2021
item.description: UConn capped its season at No. 1 in The Associated Press Top 25 women’s basketball pol l on Monday, one day after winning its 12th national championship. The Huskies received all 31 votes from a national media panel after Geno Auriemma's team beat South Carolina 82-59 for the title.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NFL personality Annie Agar suffers black eye, concussion after scary fall
item.description: NFL personality Annie Agar revealed she suffered a black eye and a concussion after passing out in her bathroom last week. Agar said it was "not fun.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Women's NCAA Final Four tournament a 'slam dunk for Tampa's economy
item.description: Even though the women’s championship is over, Tampa businesses are calling this weekend a "slam dunk." This is the fourth time the city has hosted the NCAA women’s basketball Final Four, and it’s not just basketball fans who are winning.
item.dc:creator: Georgia McCarthur, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mariners' Robles carted off field with shoulder injury after making dazzling catch against Giants
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Seattle Mariners outfielder Victor Robles injured his left shoulder and was carted off the field after making a dazzling catch in the ninth inning of a 5-4 loss to the San Francisco Giants on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ERIC HE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Liverpool loses and Southampton's relegation is sealed before a deadlocked Manchester derby
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Liverpool had a shock defeat on its march to the Premier League title — losing 3-2 at Fulham on Sunday. At the other end of the standings, Southampton became the first team to be relegated from England’s top flight this season after a 3-1 loss to Tottenham.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How Alex Ovechkin became the top goal-scorer in NHL history
item.description: Alex Ovechkin became the greatest goal scorer in NHL history because of a never-before-seen combination of a wicked shot, consistency over two decades and remarkable durability that kept him on the ice long enough to break Wayne Gretzky's record.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: From Kanye to Kidz Bop: Here are Padres players' walk-up songs this season
item.description: For those who want to relish in the anticipation of their next Petco Park visit, the Padres have released a playlist of one of the staple sounds of a baseball game, walk-up songs.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5
